name: Six-Ear Macaque: Awakening
short_description: Six- Ear Macaque: Awakening is a casual role-playing game based on the Chinese classic novel Journey to the West. The protagonist is one of the Six- Ear Macaque, is one of the "mixed four monkeys", ability and Sun Wukong equal. In the game, you will explore the legendary path of your destiny.
detailed_description:
Six-Eared Macaque: Awakening is a casual role-playing game inspired by the Chinese classic Journey to the West. The protagonist, the Six-Eared Macaque, is one of the "Four Mixed Monkeys" whose powers rival those of Sun Wukong. In the game, you'll embark on a legendary journey to explore your destined path.

Core Gameplay Features

Boundless Supernatural System

Master different Five Elements spells, movement techniques, and staff styles, with combo moves offering deep strategic depth.

Attribute Equipment Matching

Combine equipment with diverse attributes to enhance the character's base stats. Equipment can also be upgraded at the NPC Refining Workshop.

Secret Realm Exploration Challenges

  • Raging Fire Dungeon of Inferno

  • Mistmire
    Venture into mysterious realms where opportunities and dangers coexist. As the saying goes, "One flower, one world; one tree, one floating life" — welcome to the mythical world of Journey to the West where reality and illusion intertwine!

Story & Combat Highlights

The Six-Eared Macaque will travel through secret realms of varied styles to pursue their fated legend. Encounter demons and ghosts, each with unique abilities, from powerful foes to fearsome rivals. Witness how the Six-Eared Macaque:

  • Battles heaven and earth, breaking through challenges with unique supernatural powers, movement techniques, and staff styles;

  • Utilizes the Five Elements equipment system and refining enhancement system to slay demon lords as quests progress, treading the path of destiny.

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English, Russian
*languages with full audio support
